analysis.reasoning: Core message: China will eliminate absolute poverty for the first time in its history and achieve the UN SDG on poverty a decade early. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not mentioned or implied. CH2 (China as benevolent power): Indirectly touches international goals (UN SDGs), but the tweet focuses on domestic achievement rather than cooperative international behavior; evidence insufficient. CH3 (Epic history): No historical arc or adversity context provided. CH4 (Appropriate political system/values): Not explicitly defending the political system or values. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): Yes—claims a major domestic governance achievement (ending absolute poverty early), showcasing effective government performance. CH6 (Culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH5.
